issue.message: WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE no longer provides write access when targeting Android 10, unless you use `requestLegacyExternalStorage`
Consider using `apply()` instead; `commit` writes its data to persistent storage immediately, whereas `apply` will handle it in the background
Consider using `apply()` instead; `commit` writes its data to persistent storage immediately, whereas `apply` will handle it in the background
Consider using `apply()` instead; `commit` writes its data to persistent storage immediately, whereas `apply` will handle it in the background
Avoid using `android.media.ExifInterface`; use `androidx.exifinterface.media.ExifInterface` instead

Attribute `enableOnBackInvokedCallback` is only used in API level 33 and higher (current min is 26)

issue.message: produceState calls should assign `value` inside the producer lambda
Formatting %d followed by words ("words"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("notes"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("succeeded"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
issue.errorLine1: <string name="import_report_summary">Import complete: %1$d succeeded / %2$d skipped / %3$d failed. See import_report.md for details.</string>

issue.message: Formatting %d followed by words ("related"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("models"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("models"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("entities"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string

This folder configuration (`v26`) is unnecessary; `minSdkVersion` is 26. Merge all the resources in this folder into `mipmap-anydpi`.
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `#FFFFFFFF` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme.WritingApp`)

issue.errorLine1: <string name="internal_testing_known_issues_hint">反馈前请先查阅 docs/usage/known-issues.md，问题可能已被记录并附临时方案。</string>

issue.message: The resource `R.string.internal_testing_apk_location` appears to be unused
The resource `R.string.internal_testing_duration` appears to be unused
issue.errorLine1: <string name="internal_testing_duration">内测期为首版 APK 发布起 4 周，期满且无阻塞 bug 则出 release candidate。</string>

issue.message: The resource `R.string.internal_testing_release_gate` appears to be unused
issue.errorLine1: <string name="internal_testing_release_gate">所有已知问题状态为 [resolved] / [won\'t fix] / [deferred-accepted] 且反馈流 0 阻塞 bug，才打开 release 通道。</string>

issue.errorLine1: <string name="provider_step_1_install">步骤 1:安装 debug APK，启动器显示小札图标。</string>

issue.errorLine1: <string name="provider_step_2_consent">步骤 2:首次启动，滑到条款页底部，点击「同意并继续」。</string>

issue.message: The resource `R.string.provider_step_3_apikey_intro` appears to be unused
issue.errorLine1: <string name="provider_step_3_apikey_intro">步骤 3:API Key 说明页，阅读后点击「知道了」。</string>

issue.message: The resource `R.string.provider_step_4_note_and_ai` appears to be unused
issue.errorLine1: <string name="provider_step_4_note_and_ai">步骤 4:进入笔记，写一条笔记，打开详情，选中文字，点击 AI 按钮，弹出操作面板。</string>

issue.message: The resource `R.string.provider_step_5_open_model_mgmt` appears to be unused
issue.errorLine1: <string name="provider_step_5_open_model_mgmt">步骤 5:进入「我的」→「设置」→「AI 模型管理」，确认有 4 张卡:DeepSeek / Minimax / MiMo / 自定义。</string>

issue.message: The resource `R.string.provider_step_6_configure_deepseek` appears to be unused
issue.errorLine1: <string name="provider_step_6_configure_deepseek">步骤 6:点 DeepSeek 卡，API Key 栏为空，默认模型为 deepseek-v4-flash，粘贴 DeepSeek apikey 并保存，Toast 显示「已保存」。</string>

issue.message: The resource `R.string.provider_step_7_trigger_expand` appears to be unused
issue.errorLine1: <string name="provider_step_7_trigger_expand">步骤 7:返回笔记详情，再次点 AI 按钮，选「扩写」，流式面板在秒级展示生成内容。</string>

issue.message: The resource `R.string.provider_step_8_verify_history` appears to be unused
issue.errorLine1: <string name="provider_step_8_verify_history">步骤 8:可选 — 查看 ai_history 表或 logcat，确认 token 用量与耗时已落库。</string>

Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="custom_provider_helper_openai">OpenAI Chat Completions 协议:body 含 messages 数组(无 system 顶层);SSE 事件 data: {choices: [...]}。baseUrl 填厂家文档的 base URL(不含 path),path `/chat/completions` 由协议自动拼。示例:DeepSeek = https://api.deepseek.com,Moonshot = https://api.moonshot.cn/v1。</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="custom_provider_helper_openai">OpenAI Chat Completions protocol: body includes messages array (no top-level system); SSE event data: {choices: [...]}. baseUrl is the manufacturer-documented base URL (path excluded); the /chat/completions path is auto-appended by the protocol. Examples: DeepSeek = https://api.deepseek.com, Moonshot = https://api.moonshot.cn/v1.</string>

issue.message: Found byte-order-mark in the middle of a file
issue.errorLine1: // r2 修:用 ﻿ 转义取代字面量 BOM，避免 lint ByteOrderMark 报错。

issue.message: Found byte-order-mark in the middle of a file
